issues.description: node-sync.ts: N+1 K8s API calls — listPodForAllNamespaces called once per node (line 49). With 20+ nodes this hammers the API server. Should call once before the loop, group by spec.nodeName, then look up counts.

Migration 0014 missing index on (cluster_id, timestamp). All metrics.ts queries filter by gte(timestamp) and will degrade to full table scans. Add: CREATE INDEX idx_metrics_history_cluster_ts ON metrics_history(cluster_id, timestamp);
uptimeHistory hardcodes '* 5' minutes assumption for health check interval. Should import HEALTH_SYNC_INTERVAL_MS or define shared constant so calculation stays correct if interval changes.
Unused imports: 'sql' and 'desc' imported from drizzle-orm but never used.
